data.title: C&F Financial Announces Cash Dividend for Shareholders
data.description:

C&F Financial ( (CFFI) ) has issued an announcement.

On November 19, 2025, C&F Financial Corporation announced a cash dividend of 46 cents per share, payable on January 1, 2026, to shareholders recorded by December 15, 2025. This decision reflects the board’s ongoing assessment of economic conditions, capital requirements, and projected earnings, indicating a stable financial outlook and commitment to shareholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (CFFI) stock is a Buy with a $77.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on C&F Financial stock, see the CFFI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CFFI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CFFI is a Outperform.

C&F Financial’s strong valuation and positive technical indicators are the primary drivers of its stock score. The company’s solid financial performance supports this, although attention to leverage and cash flow is necessary. The absence of earnings call data and corporate events does not impact the score.

To see Spark’s full report on CFFI stock, click here.

More about C&F Financial

C&F Financial Corporation operates in the financial services industry, offering a range of products including banking, wealth management, mortgage loan origination, and indirect lending for automobiles, marine, and recreational vehicles. The company serves clients primarily in Virginia and the Mid-Atlantic, Midwest, and Southern United States.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Tactical Resources Corp. Proposes Business Combination to Form New Entity
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Tactical Resources Corp. ( (TSE:RARE) ) just unveiled an update.

Tactical Resources Corp. announced that it has mailed meeting materials to its shareholders regarding a business combination agreement with Plum Acquisition Corp. III and other entities. The proposed business combination aims to form a new corporate entity, New PubCo, with Tactical becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary. This arrangement is designed to meet NASDAQ listing standards and involves a share exchange and consolidation to facilitate the process. Shareholders are urged to vote in favor of the arrangement, which has been unanimously recommended by the Board of Directors.

More about Tactical Resources Corp.

Tactical Resources Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company based in Vancouver, British Columbia. The company focuses on exploring and developing mineral resources, with a market emphasis on leveraging strategic business combinations to enhance its industry positioning.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Starcore International Mines Reports Second Quarter Production Challenges and Solutions
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Starcore International Mine ( (TSE:SAM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Starcore International Mines reported a decrease in metal production for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 at its San Martin Mine in Mexico, primarily due to clay presence causing a ‘preg-robbing’ effect and carbon fines absorbing gold and silver. To address these issues, the company optimized its CIL plant, installed filter presses, and began separating processing circuits. These improvements, along with a new cyanide destruction module, are expected to enhance recovery rates and allow processing of stockpiled ore, potentially stabilizing production and maintaining profitability.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SAM) stock is a Hold with a C$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Starcore International Mine stock, see the TSE:SAM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SAM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SAM is a Neutral.

The overall stock score of 58 reflects a mixed outlook. The most significant factor is the company’s financial performance, which shows challenges in revenue growth and profitability. Technical analysis indicates positive momentum, which is a strong point. However, the high P/E ratio suggests potential overvaluation, and the absence of a dividend yield limits attractiveness for income-focused investors.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SAM stock, click here.

More about Starcore International Mine

Starcore International Mines is engaged in precious metals production with a focus on operations in Mexico. The company complements its producing assets with exploration and development projects across North America and has expanded internationally with a project in Côte d’Ivoire. Starcore is recognized for its leadership in Corporate Social Responsibility and commitment to increasing long-term shareholder value.

Average Trading Volume: 296,721

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$34.1M

data.title: Wave Sync Terminates Share Purchase Agreement
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

The latest update is out from Wave Sync ( (WAYS) ).

Wave Sync Corp. announced the termination of a Share Purchase/Exchange Agreement with Center Florence Holding LLC and its subsidiary, Center Florence, Inc., initially established in 2021. The agreement was intended for Wave Sync to acquire 100% of CFI’s shares in exchange for 4,600,000 shares of Wave Sync’s common stock, valued at $18,400,000. However, due to the Seller’s failure to meet certain conditions, including updating share registration and transferring assets, the transaction was not completed. Consequently, Wave Sync’s board approved the termination of the agreement on November 19, 2025, with the Seller returning the shares and Wave Sync waiving its rights to liquidated damages.

More about Wave Sync

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $86.47M

For an in-depth examination of WAYS stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Eurotech S.p.A. Amends Bylaws and Initiates Shareholder Option Offer
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Eurotech S.p.A. ( (IT:ETH) ) has provided an update.

Eurotech S.p.A. has amended its bylaws to introduce a 40% threshold of share capital or voting rights, triggering a public purchase offer obligation. The resolution allows shareholders who did not approve the change to withdraw their shares, with a total of 20,929 shares withdrawn, representing 0.054% of the company’s share capital. The option offer for these shares is now available to other shareholders, ensuring the company’s financial obligations remain within the set limit, thereby solidifying the resolution’s effectiveness.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ETH) stock is a Hold with a EUR0.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eurotech S.p.A. stock, see the IT:ETH Stock Forecast page.

More about Eurotech S.p.A.

Eurotech S.p.A. operates in the technology industry, focusing on the development and production of embedded computing systems and Internet of Things (IoT) solutions. The company targets various market segments, including industrial, transportation, and energy sectors, providing advanced computing and connectivity solutions.

data.title: Canada One Mining Corp. CEO to Speak at MiningTech North America Conference
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Canada One Mining ( (TSE:CONE) ) has provided an update.

Canada One Mining Corp. announced that its CEO, Peter Berdusco, will participate in the MiningTech North America Conference and Expo in Vancouver, where he will engage in discussions on the future of mining and present on innovative sampling techniques. This participation underscores the company’s commitment to technological innovation and positions it at the forefront of the mining industry’s transformation, particularly as it relates to the global energy transition. The Copper Dome Project, located in a prolific mining district, benefits from excellent infrastructure and aims to advance towards drill-ready target definition, further solidifying Canada One’s strategic position in the copper exploration sector.

More about Canada One Mining

Canada One Mining Corp. is a Canadian junior exploration company focusing on copper, a critical metal for the global energy transition. The company advances projects from discovery through resource definition with disciplined, data-driven exploration and responsible practices. Its flagship Copper Dome Project, located near Princeton, British Columbia, targets a porphyry copper-gold system in a Tier-1 jurisdiction, aiming to deliver sustainable growth and long-term value for shareholders and local communities.

Average Trading Volume: 119,871

Current Market Cap: C$2.73M
